headlines.title: Two killed, dozens injured in Israeli strike on displacement tents in Gaza
headlines.snippet: Two individuals were killed and dozens more were injured when an Israeli strike hit displacement tents in Gaza. The description states that the attack occurred in Gaza and resulted in casualties.

headlines.title: Kenya rights groups say protesters found dumped, tortured after arrests
headlines.snippet: Kenyan human rights groups reported that protesters were found dumped and tortured after their arrests. NGOs stated that six people were found and one remains missing following arrests at memorial gatherings for protesters killed in 2024.

headlines.title: Australia to double fines on Big Tech as children bypass social media ban
headlines.snippet: Australia is set to double fines for 'Big Tech' companies due to continued failures in preventing children from bypassing social media bans. The government in Canberra indicated that tech platforms are still allowing too many underage individuals to access social media.

headlines.title: How is framework agreement with Lebanon viewed in Israel?
headlines.snippet: A framework agreement has been signed by Israel, Lebanon, and the US with the aim of ending hostilities. However, Hezbollah, a group involved in the conflict, has rejected the deal.

headlines.title: Tropical Storm Mekkhala leaves Taiwan underwater
headlines.snippet: Tropical Storm Mekkhala has caused severe flooding across several parts of Taiwan, leaving the island submerged in water.

headlines.title: Netanyahu hails Lebanon deal as ‘blow’ to Iran and Hezbollah
headlines.snippet: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu praised the US-brokered framework agreement with Lebanon, calling it a significant achievement for Israel and a setback for Iran and Hezbollah. He stated it was reached following direct negotiations with Lebanon.

headlines.title: Israeli far-right minister Ben-Gvir attacks Lebanon deal
headlines.snippet: Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir criticized the US-brokered agreement with Lebanon, stating it was a mistake and that Lebanon would not disarm Hezbollah. His comments reflect opposition within the Israeli government to arrangements limiting military freedom of action.

headlines.title: Lebanese army urges calm as protests grow over Israel deal
headlines.snippet: Lebanon's army urged citizens to exercise calm and responsibility amidst growing protests over the Israel deal. The military stated it respects freedom of expression while warning against actions that could breach security or civil peace.

headlines.title: In the shadow of Minab: Inside the US testing of 'new missiles' on Iran’s Lamerd
headlines.snippet: In Iran's Lamerd, previously untested missiles struck a school, sports grounds, and nearby neighborhoods. This attack occurred six hours after strikes on a school in Minab, which resulted in numerous casualties, including children.

headlines.title: Israel says troops will occupy southern Lebanon
headlines.snippet: Israel's defense minister announced that troops are being prepared for a prolonged occupation in the southern Lebanon security zone. This statement follows a framework agreement between Israel and Lebanon aimed at ending hostilities.

headlines.title: US will not ignore Iranian attacks on commercial shipping, CENTCOM tells Al Arabiya
headlines.snippet: CENTCOM has informed Al Arabiya English that the US will not overlook Iranian attacks targeting commercial shipping. This statement follows recent maritime incidents in the region.

headlines.title: Israeli drone strike hits southern Lebanon day after security deal
headlines.snippet: An Israeli drone strike targeted southern Lebanon just one day after a security deal was announced between the countries. Details regarding the strike and its aftermath were reported by Al Arabiya English.

headlines.title: Rare light aircraft crash in Beijing kills pilot, injures 13 people
headlines.snippet: A rare light aircraft crash occurred in Beijing, resulting in the death of the pilot and injuring 13 other people. Al Arabiya English reported on the incident.

headlines.title: Tanker reports strike by unidentified projectile in Strait of Hormuz, UKMTO says
headlines.snippet: The UK Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) reported that a tanker was struck by an unidentified projectile in the Strait of Hormuz. Al Arabiya English provided the information regarding this event.

headlines.title: Bahrain condemns Iranian drone attacks on its territory
headlines.snippet: Bahrain has officially condemned the drone attacks launched by Iran against its territory. The condemnation was reported by Al Arabiya English.

headlines.title: Gaza rescue teams start new phase of operation to recover bodies
headlines.snippet: Gaza rescue teams have commenced a new phase of their operation to recover bodies. They plan to conclude this operation within three months as families continue their search for loved ones.

headlines.title: Iraq arrests protesters as unrest spreads over power cuts
headlines.snippet: Iraqi security forces arrested protesters in Kut following demonstrations against chronic power shortages. Unrest has spread across southern Iraq due to these power issues.

headlines.title: Israel settlers seizing Palestinian land to open 'tourist' sites
headlines.snippet: Israeli settlers have been seizing Palestinian land, converting an archaeological site near Fasayil into a tourism destination. This action is part of several incidents where land is being repurposed.

headlines.title: Israeli strike kills Palestinian siblings in Gaza tent camp
headlines.snippet: An Israeli drone strike in southern Gaza resulted in the deaths of two Palestinian siblings, one of whom was a 15-year-old girl. At least seven other individuals were wounded in the attack.

headlines.title: Palestinian parties could hold key to Israel's next government
headlines.snippet: New polling suggests that neither Benjamin Netanyahu's coalition nor the Zionist opposition can form a government without the support of Arab parties in Israel. This indicates a potentially crucial role for these parties.

headlines.title: إسدال الستار على زيارة عاشوراء وسط أجواء من الحزن والأسى
headlines.snippet: The commemoration of Ashura has concluded amidst an atmosphere of grief and sorrow. This event was reported by almayadeen.net.

headlines.title: الإعلام العالمي يتعاطف مع المنتخب الإيراني
headlines.snippet: Global media has expressed sympathy for the Iranian national team. This sentiment was reported by almayadeen.net.

headlines.title: إيران ترد على الضربات الأميركية وتلوّح بإجراءات أوسع في المنطقة
headlines.snippet: Iran has responded to US strikes and threatened broader regional actions. This response and threat were reported by almayadeen.net.

headlines.title: العراق: ملاحقة مسؤولين حكوميين متورطين في الاستيلاء على المال العام
headlines.snippet: Iraq is pursuing government officials implicated in the embezzlement of public funds. This action was reported by almayadeen.net.

headlines.title: الطوابير في غزة.. مشهد يومي في حياة الغزيين
headlines.snippet: Long queues have become a daily reality for the residents of Gaza. This situation was highlighted by almayadeen.net.

headlines.title: Crown Prince marks 32nd birthday
headlines.snippet: The Crown Prince celebrated his 32nd birthday. This event was noted by the Jordan Times.

headlines.title: Jordan accelerates digital future under Crown Prince-led tech push
headlines.snippet: Jordan is accelerating its digital transformation under the leadership of the Crown Prince, who is spearheading a technology initiative. This information comes from the Jordan Times.

headlines.title: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920, tens of thousands missing
headlines.snippet: The devastating earthquakes in Venezuela have resulted in 920 fatalities, with tens of thousands still missing. The Jordan Times reported these figures.

headlines.title: US and Iran trade strikes putting new strain on Mideast ceasefire
headlines.snippet: Strikes exchanged between the US and Iran are escalating tensions and putting new strain on the ceasefire in the Middle East. This development was reported by the Jordan Times.

headlines.title: Jordan sends rescue teams, medical staff to Venezuela following devastating earthquakes
headlines.snippet: Jordan has dispatched rescue teams and medical staff to Venezuela in the aftermath of the devastating earthquakes. The Jordan Times covered this humanitarian effort.

headlines.title: Gemayel hails Lebanon-Israel framework agreement, Bassil voices reservations
headlines.snippet: Gemayel has expressed support for the Lebanon-Israel framework agreement, while Bassil has voiced reservations about it. This was reported by L'Orient Today.

headlines.title: Iran denounces 'flagrant violation' of agreement after US strikes
headlines.snippet: Iran has denounced the US strikes as a 'flagrant violation' of an agreement. This stance was reported by L'Orient Today.

headlines.title: Israel strikes South for first time since Saturday, abducts 8 farmers in Ain Arab
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces conducted a strike in southern Lebanon and abducted eight farmers in Ain Arab. This occurred for the first time since Saturday, according to L'Orient Today.

headlines.title: UN says Iran nuclear pledge needs 'very strong' verification
headlines.snippet: The UN has stated that Iran's nuclear pledge requires 'very strong' verification. This assessment was reported by L'Orient Today.

headlines.title: A Damascus delusion: The myth of a Syrian solution for Lebanon
headlines.snippet: The idea of a Syrian solution for Lebanon is presented as a delusion. This analysis was published by L'Orient Today.

headlines.title: European heat wave brings in cool cash for Asian air-conditioner makers as sales surge
headlines.snippet: European heat waves are driving a surge in air conditioner sales for Asian manufacturers like Samsung Electronics and China's Midea. As Europe experiences record temperatures, companies in South Korea, China, and Japan are seeing increased demand for cooling appliances.

headlines.title: Harry and Meghan accept King’s invitation to stay in royal residence during upcoming UK visit
headlines.snippet: Prince Harry and Meghan have accepted an invitation from the King to stay in a royal residence during their upcoming visit to the United Kingdom. This visit, their first in four years, sparks hopes for improved relations within the royal family.

headlines.title: A small plane slammed into the tallest skyscraper in China’s capital. Hours later, it was like nothing had happened.
headlines.snippet: A small plane crashed into Beijing's tallest skyscraper, the CITIC Tower, killing the pilot and injuring 13 others. Debris from the crash fell hundreds of feet, impacting the surrounding area.

headlines.title: The US and Iran have a deal on paper. At sea, the Strait of Hormuz is ‘chaotic’
headlines.snippet: Despite a US-Iran deal on paper, the Strait of Hormuz remains 'chaotic,' with Iran's Revolutionary Guards issuing warnings to ships. Iran has warned vessels transiting the vital oil chokepoint about consequences if they deviate from designated routes.

headlines.title: Egypt’s envoy to UN: Sudan bears consequences of ‘manufactured crisis’
headlines.snippet: Egypt's envoy to the UN stated that Sudan is facing the consequences of a 'manufactured crisis.' Ambassador Ehab Mostafa Awad Mostafa urged the international community not to remain passive regarding the suffering of the Sudanese people.

headlines.title: السلطة السياسية توقع ورقة الاستسلام وتبيع الجنوب - Al Akhbar
headlines.snippet: The political authority has signed a paper of surrender and sold the South, according to Al Akhbar.

headlines.title: بري: إنّها الفتنة! - Al Akhbar
headlines.snippet: The title 'The Speaker: It is sedition!' from Al Akhbar has no description.

headlines.title: القوة أولاً والقانون لاحقاً: ماذا تكشف المفاوضات الأميركية - الإيرانية؟ - Al Akhbar
headlines.snippet: The negotiations between the US and Iran are revealing a focus on power over law. This perspective was shared by Al Akhbar.

headlines.title: مصر تتعادل مع إيران وتنهي دور المجموعات في الوصافة - Al Akhbar
headlines.snippet: Egypt tied with Iran, finishing second in their group. This result was reported by Al Akhbar.

headlines.title: لبنان يوقع اتفاق العار... نتنياهو: إنجاز كبير لإسرائيل! - Al Akhbar
headlines.snippet: Lebanon signed the 'shameful' agreement, while Netanyahu called it a great achievement for Israel. This sentiment was expressed by Al Akhbar.

headlines.title: “التيار الوطني” عن “اتفاق الإطار”: لم يذكُر الإنسحاب الإسرائيلي من الأراضي اللبنانية المحتلة بشكل واضح وصريح
headlines.snippet: The Free Patriotic Movement stated that the framework agreement did not explicitly mention the withdrawal of Israel from occupied Lebanese territories.

headlines.title: “التيار الوطني” عن “اتفاق الإطار”: لم يذكُر الإنسحاب الإسرائيلي من الأراضي اللبنانية المحتلة بشكل واضح وصريح
headlines.snippet: The Free Patriotic Movement reaffirmed its commitment to a comprehensive and lasting peace agreement, contingent on justice and national rights. The movement noted that the framework agreement signed in Washington requires specific clarifications.

headlines.title: بلدية فرون: بلدتنا تقع خارج الخط الأصفر ونستنكر الحديث عن ضمها إلى ما يسمى بالمناطق التجريبية
headlines.snippet: The municipality of Fraun, located outside the 'yellow line,' denounced claims of its annexation to so-called experimental zones. The mayor stated that the town is not an occupied area and the discussion lacks any basis.

headlines.title: قراءة في آخر المستجدات الإيرانية من طهران مع الدكتور حسن حيدر
headlines.snippet: There is a discussion about the latest Iranian developments with Dr. Hassan Haidar, as per the title. No description provided.

headlines.title: مواكبة لآخر التطورات في جنوب لبنان مع مراسلنا سامر حاج علي
headlines.snippet: Our correspondent Samer Haj Ali is covering the latest developments in southern Lebanon.

headlines.title: Israeli forces detain former Palestinian detainee after surrounding his home north of Hebron - WAFA Agency
headlines.snippet: Israeli forces detained a former Palestinian detainee after surrounding his home north of Hebron. The WAFA Agency reported on this incident.

headlines.title: Occupation forces fire tear gas into home in al-Mughayyir, suffocation cases reported - WAFA Agency
headlines.snippet: Occupation forces fired tear gas into a home in al-Mughayyir, leading to reported cases of suffocation. This event was reported by the WAFA Agency.

headlines.title: Israeli colonists attack Bedouin community near Khan al-Ahmar - WAFA Agency
headlines.snippet: Israeli colonists attacked a Bedouin community near Khan al-Ahmar. The WAFA Agency reported on the incident.

headlines.title: Several Palestinians suffer tear gas inhalation as Israeli forces raid village northeast of Ramallah - WAFA Agency
headlines.snippet: Several Palestinians suffered from tear gas inhalation when Israeli forces raided a village northeast of Ramallah. The WAFA Agency reported on the events.

headlines.title: President Abbas sends letters to world leaders warning of Israeli measures targeting churches in occupied Jerusalem - WAFA Agency
headlines.snippet: President Abbas has sent letters to world leaders, warning of Israeli measures targeting churches in occupied Jerusalem. This action was reported by the WAFA Agency.

headlines.title: احذروا.. أدوية تسبب أضراراً صحية خطيرة خلال شدة الحر
headlines.snippet: Caution is advised regarding certain medications that can cause serious health damage during intense heat. This warning was issued by paltoday.ps.

headlines.title: شهيد إثر إلقاء طائرة مسيرة "اسرائيلية" قنبلة في بيت لاهيا
headlines.snippet: A martyr fell after an Israeli drone dropped a bomb in Beit Lahia. This incident was reported by paltoday.ps.

headlines.title: إصابة برصاص الاحتلال في خانيونس
headlines.snippet: An injury occurred from occupation fire in Khan Yunis. This event was reported by paltoday.ps.

headlines.title: الاحتلال يحول السجون لمسرح دائم لجرائمه بحق الاسرى
headlines.snippet: The occupation is turning prisons into a permanent stage for its crimes against detainees. This statement was made by paltoday.ps.

headlines.title: الاحتلال يغلق مسجد الرأس أمام المصلين في الخليل
headlines.snippet: The occupation forces closed Al-Ras Mosque to worshippers in Hebron. This action was reported by paltoday.ps.

headlines.title: France says 74 drowning deaths since 18 June
headlines.snippet: France has reported 74 drowning deaths since June 18. This information was provided by Arab News.

headlines.title: Site of deadly Swiss ski resort fire will never reopen as a bar: regional chief
headlines.snippet: The site of a deadly fire at a Swiss ski resort will never reopen as a bar, according to a regional chief. Arab News reported this decision.

headlines.title: Hezbollah rejects US-brokered Israel-Lebanon security deal as ‘surrender’
headlines.snippet: Hezbollah has rejected the US-brokered Israel-Lebanon security deal, calling it 'surrender.' This rejection was reported by Arab News.

headlines.title: Israeli drone strike hits southern Lebanon day after security deal
headlines.snippet: An Israeli drone strike hit southern Lebanon the day after a security deal was announced. Arab News reported on the incident.

headlines.title: Tanker struck in the Strait of Hormuz as Iran and US launch attacks in region
headlines.snippet: A tanker was struck in the Strait of Hormuz amidst attacks by Iran and the US in the region. This event was reported by Arab News.

headlines.title: India captain Shreyas Iyer warns 'can't take anything for granted' after shock T20 loss to Ireland
headlines.snippet: India captain Shreyas Iyer warned that his team 'can't take anything for granted' after a surprising T20 loss to Ireland. The National reported on his comments.

headlines.title: Senegal's Lions of Teranga maul Iraq's Lions of Mesopotamia
headlines.snippet: Senegal's national football team, the Lions of Teranga, decisively defeated Iraq's Lions of Mesopotamia. The National covered this match result.

headlines.title: More than 100 vessels evacuated from Strait of Hormuz as Gulf of Oman attack halts wider rescue mission
headlines.snippet: Over 100 vessels were evacuated from the Strait of Hormuz after an attack in the Gulf of Oman halted a wider rescue mission. The National reported on the incident.

headlines.title: Poor response to call for mass protests in Gaza over living conditions
headlines.snippet: There was a poor response to a call for mass protests in Gaza concerning living conditions. The National reported on the low turnout.

headlines.title: Lebanon and Israel sign framework agreement in Washington
headlines.snippet: Lebanon and Israel have signed a framework agreement in Washington. The National reported on the signing.

headlines.title: Gulf News Advertiser Portal | The UAE's Most Trusted Voice
headlines.snippet: The Gulf News Advertiser Portal is described as the UAE's Most Trusted Voice. This description comes from Gulf News.

headlines.title: Photos: Over 10,000 Vespas take over Rome as iconic scooter turns 80
headlines.snippet: Over 10,000 Vespas have taken over Rome as the iconic scooter celebrates its 80th anniversary. Photos of the event were published by Gulf News.

headlines.title: UAE strongly condemns hostile drone attacks by Iran on Bahrain
headlines.snippet: The UAE strongly condemns the hostile drone attacks carried out by Iran against Bahrain. This condemnation was issued by Gulf News.

headlines.title: AI is helping scientists decode birdsong — and human-animal conversations may be closer than ever
headlines.snippet: Artificial intelligence is aiding scientists in decoding birdsong, potentially bringing human-animal conversations closer. This development was reported by Gulf News.

headlines.title: Trump unveils US passport featuring his own portrait for America's 250th anniversary
headlines.snippet: Trump has unveiled a US passport featuring his own portrait for America's 250th anniversary. Gulf News reported on this design.

headlines.title: MOPH launches Mental Health promotion program for senior citizens
headlines.snippet: The Ministry of Public Health (MOPH) has launched a Mental Health promotion program specifically for senior citizens. This initiative was announced by Gulf Times.

headlines.title: Sidra medicine launches specialized Microbiome Service to advance precision care for women and children
headlines.snippet: Sidra Medicine has introduced a specialized Microbiome Service to advance precision care for women and children. This new service was highlighted by Gulf Times.

headlines.title: Qatar study highlights AI’s great potential for diagnostic precision in women’s health
headlines.snippet: A study conducted in Qatar indicates that AI holds significant potential for improving diagnostic precision in women's health. Gulf Times reported on the findings.

headlines.title: Private sector engagement strengthens academic links, says educator
headlines.snippet: An educator stated that private sector engagement is strengthening academic links. This perspective was shared with Gulf Times.

headlines.title: Minister of Interior meets US Acting Attorney General
headlines.snippet: The Minister of Interior met with the US Acting Attorney General. This meeting was reported by Gulf Times.

headlines.title: Nepal embassy organises export and tourism promotion event
headlines.snippet: The Nepal embassy organized an export and tourism promotion event. This event was covered by Times of Oman.

headlines.title: HM's state visit to France draws widespread international media attention
headlines.snippet: His Majesty's state visit to France has garnered widespread attention from the international media. This coverage was reported by Times of Oman.

headlines.title: Iran seeks "insurance mechanism" to reduce risks for ships transiting through Hormuz
headlines.snippet: Iran is seeking an 'insurance mechanism' to mitigate risks for ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz. Times of Oman reported on this initiative.

headlines.title: Indian PM Modi touches down in Seychelles on three-day official visit
headlines.snippet: Indian Prime Minister Modi has arrived in Seychelles for a three-day official visit. Times of Oman covered his arrival.

headlines.title: Military-age Ukrainian men could lose EU protection
headlines.snippet: Military-age Ukrainian men may lose their EU protection. This potential change in status was reported by Times of Oman.

headlines.title: Netanyahu: 'The agreement strengthens Israel and Lebanon, weakens Iran and Hezbollah'
headlines.snippet: Netanyahu stated that 'The agreement strengthens Israel and Lebanon, weakens Iran and Hezbollah.' He hailed the Israel-Lebanon agreement as a step forward and vowed continued operations to secure the north.

headlines.title: IDF killed Walid Haniyeh, nephew of former Hamas leader Ismail Haniyeh, military says
headlines.snippet: The IDF stated it killed Walid Haniyeh, identified as the nephew of former Hamas leader Ismail Haniyeh. Haniyeh was reportedly the deputy commander of a Nukhba company involved in the October 7 infiltration.

headlines.title: New Israel-Lebanon agreement adopts 'trust, but verify' strategy - analysis
headlines.snippet: The new Israel-Lebanon agreement utilizes a 'trust, but verify' strategy, establishing a performance-based framework. This approach requires Lebanon to demonstrate its ability to control Hezbollah.

headlines.title: US, Iran, and Oman butt heads over fine print of Strait of Hormuz deal - analysis
headlines.snippet: The US, Iran, and Oman are reportedly in disagreement over the specifics of a Strait of Hormuz deal. The dispute centers on diplomatic wording regarding future 'services' and 'costs.'

headlines.title: Israel abortion application rates decline, with nearly all requests gaining approval, CBS reports
headlines.snippet: Abortion application rates in Israel have declined, with nearly all requests receiving approval. CBS reported that 99.8% of applications were approved in 2024, reflecting high fertility rates.

headlines.title: Hezbollah says Israel-Lebanon agreement ‘null and void,’ as its allies threaten civil war
headlines.snippet: Hezbollah has declared the Israel-Lebanon agreement 'null and void,' with allies threatening civil war. Naim Qassem called the deal a 'humiliation,' and an MP slammed Beirut's 'complete submission.'

headlines.title: IDF says it struck terror operatives in south Lebanon, after framework deal announced
headlines.snippet: The IDF reported striking 'terror operatives' in southern Lebanon following the announcement of the framework deal. The army stated it acted against a threat to troops, with unclear results of the strikes.

headlines.title: Jewish resistance hero’s French Panthéon entry sparks row over far right’s use of his legacy
headlines.snippet: The induction of Jewish resistance hero Marc Bloch into France's Panthéon has ignited controversy regarding the far-right's use of his legacy. Bloch, a historian and fighter, was referenced by the head of the National Rally party.

headlines.title: Iran fires drones at Bahrain, oil tanker hit in Hormuz as clashes test deal
headlines.snippet: Iran fired drones at Bahrain and an oil tanker was hit in Hormuz as clashes tested a deal. The IRGC claimed to target the 'US terrorist army' following overnight strikes and an Iranian attack on a ship.

headlines.title: Settler and masked soldier allegedly break into Hebron mosque, disrupt call to prayer
headlines.snippet: A settler and a masked soldier allegedly broke into a Hebron mosque, disrupting the call to prayer. The PA reported the incident, stating it's part of an attempt to eliminate the ancient city's Arab and Muslim identity.

headlines.title: Nearing 1,000 days since Oct. 7, anti-Netanyahu gov't rallies held across Israel
headlines.snippet: Rallies against the government have been held across Israel as the 1,000-day mark since October 7 approaches. Haaretz reported on these demonstrations.

headlines.title: TLV anti-pinkwashing Pride march slams Israel's 'misogynistic, fascist forces'
headlines.snippet: The TLV anti-pinkwashing Pride march criticized Israel's 'misogynistic, fascist forces.' This event was reported by Haaretz.

headlines.title: Board Member Says $26m in Donations Went Missing From Haredi Israeli Nonprofit
headlines.snippet: A board member reported that $26 million in donations went missing from a Haredi Israeli nonprofit. Haaretz published details of the alleged financial discrepancy.

headlines.title: Israel Strikes Southern Lebanon Day After U.S.-brokered Deal, Report Says
headlines.snippet: Israel reportedly struck southern Lebanon the day after the U.S.-brokered deal was announced. Haaretz cited reports on the military action.

headlines.title: Settlers, IDF Raid West Bank Mosque Hang Israeli Flags, Palestinians Report
headlines.snippet: Settlers and the IDF allegedly raided a West Bank mosque and hung Israeli flags, according to Palestinian reports. Haaretz covered these claims.

headlines.title: Tehran is preparing to host a worthy farewell ceremony for martyred Leader
headlines.snippet: Tehran is preparing to host a large ceremony to commemorate the martyred Leader Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei. The event expects significant participation from Iranians and international guests.

headlines.title: Iran says it remains ‘standard-bearer’ in global fight against WMDs
headlines.snippet: Iran's Foreign Minister declared that Iran remains the 'standard-bearer' in the global fight against weapons of mass destruction. This statement was made during the anniversary of the chemical bombing of Sardasht.

headlines.title: Iran offers condolences, aid to Venezuela following deadly earthquakes
headlines.snippet: Iran has offered condolences and aid to Venezuela following two deadly earthquakes. Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi contacted his Venezuelan counterpart to convey sympathies and readiness to assist.

headlines.title: Army to assist institutions overseeing Ayatollah Khamenei’s funeral ceremonies
headlines.snippet: The Islamic Republic of Iran Army has pledged full support to institutions organizing farewell and funeral ceremonies for the martyred Leader Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei.

headlines.title: FM Araghchi urges expanded cooperation with Georgia in areas of mutual interest
headlines.snippet: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi called for expanded cooperation with Georgia in areas of mutual interest during a meeting with Iran's Ambassador to Georgia.

headlines.title: Struggle against Zionism necessary for Turkey's survival
headlines.snippet: The struggle against Zionism is deemed necessary for Turkey's survival. This viewpoint was reported by Mehr News Agency.

headlines.title: Hezbollah leader rejects US-brokered Lebanon deal
headlines.snippet: The Hezbollah leader has rejected the US-brokered Lebanon deal. This rejection was reported by Mehr News Agency.

headlines.title: Security forces kill 8 terrorists in SW Pakistan ops.
headlines.snippet: Security forces killed eight terrorists during operations in southwest Pakistan. Mehr News Agency reported on the outcome.

headlines.title: UKMTO reports new ship attack in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.snippet: The UK Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) reported a new ship attack in the Strait of Hormuz. Mehr News Agency provided this update.

headlines.title: 5 killed in rain-related incidents in Afghanistan
headlines.snippet: Five people were killed in rain-related incidents across Afghanistan. Mehr News Agency reported on the casualties.
